modifiers.name: Content delivery surface
modifiers.purpose: Publish and organize navigable content.
modifiers.selection_rule: Select for a governed publishing surface.

modifiers.name: Interactive web surface
modifiers.purpose: Govern web interaction, inputs, states, and workflows.
modifiers.selection_rule: Select when interactive web behavior is a sustained responsibility.

modifiers.name: Native client surface
modifiers.purpose: Govern an installed client lifecycle.
modifiers.selection_rule: Select for mobile or desktop installed clients.

modifiers.name: Synchronous service
modifiers.purpose: Respond through a sustained remote request-response contract.
modifiers.selection_rule: Select when a synchronous remote interface is governed.

modifiers.name: Asynchronous processor
modifiers.purpose: Process work outside a synchronous request path.
modifiers.selection_rule: Select for workers, consumers, schedules, or batches.

modifiers.name: Persistent store
modifiers.purpose: Govern durable persistence with its own lifecycle.
modifiers.selection_rule: Select when schema, migration, retention, backup, or recovery is material.

modifiers.name: Reusable package
modifiers.purpose: Distribute code with a sustained consumer surface.
modifiers.selection_rule: Select for libraries, packages, or SDK components.

modifiers.name: CLI surface
modifiers.purpose: Expose stable commands, inputs, outputs, and execution results.
modifiers.selection_rule: Select for supported human or automation command interfaces.

modifiers.name: Data pipeline
modifiers.purpose: Move, transform, validate, and reprocess data.
modifiers.selection_rule: Select when lineage, quality, or replay is a primary component responsibility.
non_activation_signals: component is only a durable store

modifiers.name: Model lifecycle
modifiers.purpose: Train, evaluate, promote, register, and monitor models.
modifiers.selection_rule: Select for governed model lifecycle responsibilities.

modifiers.name: Agentic orchestrator
modifiers.purpose: Coordinate autonomy, tools, context, memory, approvals, and evals.
modifiers.selection_rule: Select when material autonomous action is governed.
non_activation_signals: LLM feature is subordinate and non-autonomous

modifiers.name: Public exposure
modifiers.purpose: Harden externally exposed surfaces.
modifiers.selection_rule: Activate outside a controlled internal boundary.

modifiers.name: Personal data
modifiers.purpose: Govern identifiable or linkable personal data.
modifiers.selection_rule: Activate when personal data is processed.

modifiers.name: Regulated data
modifiers.purpose: Govern data subject to a named regulatory basis.
modifiers.selection_rule: Activate only with an identified regulatory basis.

modifiers.name: Multi-tenancy
modifiers.purpose: Govern tenant isolation and shared-resource boundaries.
modifiers.selection_rule: Activate when multiple tenants share governed resources.

modifiers.name: Offline operation
modifiers.purpose: Govern durable work without continuous connectivity.
modifiers.selection_rule: Activate when offline work or reconciliation is required.
non_activation_signals: connectivity is required for all useful work

modifiers.name: High availability
modifiers.purpose: Govern committed availability, continuity, and recovery.
modifiers.selection_rule: Activate for a material availability commitment.

modifiers.name: Public compatibility commitment
modifiers.purpose: Govern sustained external compatibility and deprecation.
modifiers.selection_rule: Activate for a public compatibility promise.
non_activation_signals: experimental interface with no support promise

modifiers.name: Third-party extensibility
modifiers.purpose: Govern extension points and untrusted integrations.
modifiers.selection_rule: Activate when third parties can extend behavior.

modifiers.name: Privileged execution
modifiers.purpose: Govern actions with sensitive or elevated effects.
modifiers.selection_rule: Activate when execution can mutate privileged resources.

modifiers.name: Human-impacting automation
modifiers.purpose: Govern automated decisions with material effects on people.
modifiers.selection_rule: Activate when automation materially affects people or access.
non_activation_signals: automation has no material human impact
